programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: E2 - Surviving the Flood
programme.desc: Track Molelo's pride, who are exhausted by cub care when the winter floods arrive. Check on the cheetah cubs, who make a difficult decision, and witness a scary encounter that makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E2 - Surviving the Flood
programme.desc: Track Molelo's pride, who are exhausted by cub care when the winter floods arrive. Check on the cheetah cubs, who make a difficult decision, and witness a scary encounter that makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E3 - Ugly
programme.desc: Gawk at some of the world’s ugliest animals who owe their survival to the adaptations that made them so strange. A pudgy wolf eel, naked mole rat, and hideous sea lamprey may be superficially grotesque, but they’re evolutionarily amazing.

programme.title: E3 - Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn in Africa brings opportunities. Cape Fur seals, Samango monkeys, chameleons, impala, and more respond to the season. Autumn triggers changes in the lives of many animals. Rare creatures reveal themselves and predators gather to take advantage.

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef
programme.desc: It’s summer in the Gulf of Oman. The scorching Arabian sun heats the shallow waters to 86 degrees boosting the growth of algae across a vast coral reef. This attracts thousands of hungry herbivores creating a fish versus fish turf war.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E8 - Tree Tales
programme.desc: Trees are Africa’s oldest residents, and each has its own strategy for surviving the dry season. The sausage tree and the fig tree ride-out seasonal extremes, to provide food and shelter for struggling animals in the lean times. In return animals help these trees to reproduce by pollinating their flowers and dispersing their seed. African trees promote life, and form the backbone of one of Earths’ most precious ecosystems.

programme.title: E4 - The Hauraki Gulf/ Te Moananui a Toi
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the teeming waters of the Hauraki Gulf, near Auckland, New Zealand, and explore a true paradise for ocean creatures. Catch a glimpse of a stealthy manta ray, enjoy dolphin antics, and admire a kaleidoscope of tropical fish.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E4 - The Hauraki Gulf/ Te Moananui a Toi
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the teeming waters of the Hauraki Gulf, near Auckland, New Zealand, and explore a true paradise for ocean creatures. Catch a glimpse of a stealthy manta ray, enjoy dolphin antics, and admire a kaleidoscope of tropical fish.

programme.title: E4 - Defenders of the Reef
programme.desc: It’s summer in the Gulf of Oman. The scorching Arabian sun heats the shallow waters to 86 degrees boosting the growth of algae across a vast coral reef. This attracts thousands of hungry herbivores creating a fish versus fish turf war.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E8 - Tree Tales
programme.desc: Trees are Africa’s oldest residents, and each has its own strategy for surviving the dry season. The sausage tree and the fig tree ride-out seasonal extremes, to provide food and shelter for struggling animals in the lean times. In return animals help these trees to reproduce by pollinating their flowers and dispersing their seed. African trees promote life, and form the backbone of one of Earths’ most precious ecosystems.

programme.title: E4 - The Hauraki Gulf/ Te Moananui a Toi
programme.desc: Take a deep dive into the teeming waters of the Hauraki Gulf, near Auckland, New Zealand, and explore a true paradise for ocean creatures. Catch a glimpse of a stealthy manta ray, enjoy dolphin antics, and admire a kaleidoscope of tropical fish.

programme.title: E5 - Three Kings Islands/ Manawatāwhi
programme.desc: Delve into the strange magic of the Three Kings Islands, a remote archipelago north of New Zealand. Swim with a pod of bottlenose dolphins, join short-tailed stingrays on a hunt, and feel the tension as a gang of predatory orcas arrives on the scene.

programme.title: E6 - Cook Islands/ Kūki 'Airani
programme.desc: Travel to the Cook Islands, the destination of choice for 3,000 humpback whales ready to mate and raise their young. Witness giant clams and green turtles thriving in the islands’ massive coral reef and get a glimpse into our evolutionary past.

programme.title: E4 - The Hauraki Gulf/ Te Moananui a Toi

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E1 - Einstein Must Go!
programme.desc: Get to know the Waterfront Pride: males Tom Tom and Caller, 8 lionesses, 10 youths, and Einstein, the grown cub who never left home. Watch Einstein’s defiance catch up with him when rivals from the Outsiders Pride make a play that seals his fate.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E2 - Adapt Or Die
programme.desc: Feel the heat when the pride tries to hunt down adequate food as drought conditions push them (and their prey) dangerously close to death. Watch Einstein adapt to solo life, then assess the damage after new mom Kalwezi fights for her cubs’ lives.

programme.title: E3 - Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Contend with the challenges of the rainy season, which turns everything green and spoils the lions’ camouflage. Watch Einstein fail to make new connections and weigh the pros and cons when Keeza and her cub are kidnapped by rival male Mad-Eye Moody.

programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E7 - Obstculos
programme.desc: Daniel spends some father-daughter time with a traumatized Sam. Johnny plans to form a new karate dojo but struggles to come up with a cool name.

programme.title: E4 - Bicephaly
programme.desc: Kreese brings Terry back to Cobra Kai, but his former partner is not interested in repeating history. Johnny grows envious of Daniel mentoring Miguel.

programme.title: E5 - Match Point
programme.desc: Johnny and Daniel's dojo - and their fragile alliance - teeter on the brink of collapse when they agree to a winner-takes-all sensei showdown.

programme.desc: Miguel and Sam are excited about attending the junior prom until another couple unexpectedly shows up. Terry lures Johnny to a familiar location.

programme.title: E9 - The Fall
programme.desc: The annual All Valley Karate Tournament kicks off as several competing dojos vie for the grand championship - and settle some personal scores.

programme.title: E6 - Ouroboros
programme.desc: Terry recruits an expert in the way of the fist. Daniel walks away from a fight, and Johnny and Chozen pick one. In prison, Kreese confronts old demons.

programme.title: E8 - Taikai
programme.desc: A coveted spot in an elite international tournament ignites a fight between dojos. Tory's loyalties are tested. Sam struggles to let Miguel go.

programme.title: E9 - Survivors
programme.desc: Tory pays a price for defiance. Stingray does battle with his conscience. A celebratory night on the town takes a turn for Johnny, Daniel and Chozen.

programme.title: E3 - Fire And Ice
programme.desc: Daniel pulls out all the stops in an effort to recruit new students to Miyagi Do. Johnny reflects on some of the major relationships in his life - and responds to Daniel's promotional efforts with his own.

programme.title: E10 - No Mercy
programme.desc: It's the first day of school at West Valley High but tensions between the two dojos have not cooled with the end of summer. And the rivalry between Daniel and Johnny comes to a head.

programme.title: E5 - Miyagi-Do
programme.desc: In Okinawa, Daniel spends time with an old friend - and an old enemy, who has much to teach him. The dueling dojos' rivalry comes to a nasty head.

The Bahamas Golf Classic at Atlantis Paradise Island
A Perfect Picnic
programme.desc: When the kids can't agree on a perfect picnic location, they learn that compromise is important so everyone can have fun.

programme.title: Flying Pig
programme.desc: My oh my... it's a pig in the sky! We'll show you how to make this little piggy go “weeeeeeee!”

programme.title: What Are Memories For
programme.desc: The Rhythmic squad is training hard for the competition. But a disaster strikes when one of the team gets injured. And things aren't going so well for trampoline gymnast Corey either.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Make or Break
programme.desc: It's a busy week for our Ice Stars. Charlie and Freddie have tryouts for a different sort of ice sport. Meanwhile, the Icicles are taking a break from their busy schedule and having some fun off the ice. And Asiyah is waiting for an important call.

programme.title: The Danish Elephant
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates how following a specific sequence of arithmetic steps, combined with the special properties of number 9, will always result in the same answer. Amaze your friends with your mind-reading super skills!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: A Perfect Picnic
programme.desc: When the kids can't agree on a perfect picnic location, they learn that compromise is important so everyone can have fun.

programme.title: Flying Pig
programme.desc: My oh my... it's a pig in the sky! We'll show you how to make this little piggy go “weeeeeeee!”

programme.title: The Keeper (Maddie Hinch) and The Explorer (Ranulph Fiennes)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, the world's best field hockey goalkeeper and Olympic gold medallist, Maddie Hinch, and the world's greatest living explorer, Ranulph Fiennes, share their record breaking journeys.

programme.title: Day of the Animal
programme.desc: Gavin can't find the right animal costume for the upcoming local marathon. Ricky helps him decide by making a piranha fish bag and a baboon chalk picture inspired by artist Georgia O'Keeffe.

programme.title: Cell Down
programme.desc: When Kaylyn gets the team an invite to pitch an idea on a popular tv show, Max and Alicia invent an app that limits phone use while Noodles and Zeke build a 'Smart Belt'.

programme.title: Find the Culprit
programme.desc: Eric learns that everyone has their own unique fingerprint. He shows how to do a fingerprint experiment and then he uses it to find out who took a bite out of his chocolate cake.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ice hockey brothers Rais and Aren are off to Canada for the trip of a lifetime, as Aren has a tournament and is hoping to make his family proud. And Ella and Asiyah are showing us just what determined young skaters they are.

programme.title: Itchy Crusty Scabs
programme.desc: In this episode, Billy Bones, Mr. Grumbles, and Dr. Chris try to stop Dr. Xand from itching his scab! Find out how scabs work and why you shouldn't scratch them as the doctors show you how to make edible scabs – yummy!

programme.title: Weigh to Go!
programme.desc: In this episode we explore the measurable property 'weight'. How can we measure and compare weights of objects using specific tools, units, and volume? And, does weight equal size? To find the answers, Eric uses a very heavy object and a lot of very light objects.

programme.title: Pick a Block of Dates - Any Block
programme.desc: This episode introduces the mathematical mean: the number you get when you add up all numbers and divide them by the number of numbers. Eric presents a trick you can do by calculating the sum of a 3-by-3 block of dates on a calendar without using a calculator.

programme.title: Magic Cups
programme.desc: In this episode we teach you how to get three cups facing down in just three moves. Easy? Not at all. You start with one cup facing down and for each move you make, two of the three cups must be flipped simultaneously. Ready, set ... FLIP!

programme.title: We can be Heroes
programme.desc: Izzy is back at the hospital to get the results of her MRI scan and is worried that her dreams of a career as an acro gymnast may be over. Back at his home, Chase is choosing photos for a school presentation.

programme.title: Actually, It's An Estimate
programme.desc: An approximation is the nearest estimate if we don't know the exact size of something. In this episode, we learn how accurate estimates come about by using clues and information about things in our everyday lives.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

E11 - The Designer Wales Bonner
programme.desc: Fashion, design, gastronomy, lifestyle... Discover the world of French chic!

programme.title: E1 - Martelange
programme.desc: To kick off the 2025 season, Adrien Joveneau highlights the town of Martelange, located on the Luxembourg border, known for its slate mining past and its wooded landscapes. The musical guest for this stop is the band Suarez, accompanied by Antoine Donneaux.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E19 - Charente-Maritime Special Programme
programme.desc: Sebastien Lys uses eye and ear to fish for mullet; Brice Thomas shares his passion for producing salt. Collecting ray eggs with the association IODDE. Raphael Musseau, doctor in ecology, and Jean-Claude Barbraud, ornithologist at the Museum National d'Histoire Naturelle, follow white storks. Plus a visit to Marans.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.title: E8 - From Guadeloupe To Saint Martin
programme.desc: Welcome to the French West Indies, exploring two overseas territories with diverse natural treasures. In Guadeloupe, discover the breathtaking landscapes of the ''Island of Beautiful Waters.'' Then head to Saint Martin, an island half French, half Dutch...

programme.title: E2 - Ground Meats
programme.desc: Quebec's culinary heritage wouldn't be the same without ground meat. To honor this often-misunderstood ingredient, we invite Nathalie Simard, Jean-Sebastien Girard, and chefs Marc Maula and Amine Laabi.

programme.title: E24 - Transformation Of A Bungalow Into A House With Natural Materials
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Linkebeek to discover the transformation of an old bungalow into a sustainable house.

programme.title: E3 - Managing Risk
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas head to Sainte-Anne-des-Monts, where backcountry skiing must adapt to environmental challenges. They take care not to disturb the endangered Gaspesie woodland caribou.

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.desc: Bondi Icebergs is the most photographed pool in the world. For nearly a century this spectacular 50 metre stretch of sparkling blue at the southern end of Bondi Beach has occupied a special corner in the hearts of millions.

programme.title: E1 - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 1) The Population Bomb
programme.desc: For years, many feared our planet would be stripped by the weight of a colossal population. In 2026 we've found ourselves in a world where we're not scared about having too many babies, but too few. So what happened?

programme.desc: A Fijian engineer and her Australian counterpart tackle hazardous waste water across informal settlements. Their work could hold lessons with the potential to improve lives for billions around the world.

programme.desc: Nearly a third of all species face extinction. From biodiversity credits to AI tools like BirdNET to efforts stop the spread of the dangerous Asian tiger mosquito, new solutions aim to protect biodiversity, ecosystems and human health.

programme.title: Mental Health: Ill Or Just Wired Differently?
programme.desc: Is a lack of concentration a sign of ADHD? Is a spell of feeling down actually depression? In Good Shape looks at mental health and neurodiversity.

programme.title: We Are Science
programme.desc: Even though there has been tremendous progress in the number of women participating in higher education, women and girls make up only a minority in science. They are still often directed away from science subjects growing up, limiting their preparation and opportunities to go into these fields as adults. That needs to change.

programme.title: Lifestyle Europe
programme.desc: Why a German entrepreneur imports coffee beans by sailing ship, what moving from the U.S. to Italy is like, and the curious world of Swedish sweets.

programme.title: Serving The Pope With Your Life - What It's Like To Be A Swiss Guard
programme.desc: Dario is 25, Swiss, and has just sworn to protect the Pope - even if it costs him his life. In this rare behind-the-scenes look, we follow him through Vatican City, past tourists and tradition, and into the inner workings of one of the world's oldest military units.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E844 - Looking For Things
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is baking an apple pie, so Daddy Pig suggests Peppa and George play a game of looking for things. Peppa and George have fun running around the house solving the clues.

programme.title: E837 - Grampy Rabbit's Jetpack
programme.desc: It's snowing and Grampy Rabbit has built a jetpack. While showing it to Peppa and George, he shoots off into the distance ending up on top of a snowy mountain. Miss Rabbit goes to rescue him, but Grampy Rabbit is the one that rescues them all.

programme.title: E840 - Stone Age Granny
programme.desc: Granny and her friends' historical re-enactment society are being cave people today. Peppa and George join in helping to catch Grandpa Pig who is dressed as a woolly mammoth.

programme.title: E224 - The Crew And Rocky Build A Bear Island
programme.desc: Rocky visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay just in time to see Builder Cove's new baby bear! But when Park Ranger Rose asks for construction help, Speed Meister accidentally ruins the bears' home. It's up to all the pups and Rocky to save the day!

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E305 - Dora's Birthday Surprise / Moonlight Fiesta
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre.

programme.title: E113 - The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: E117 - Where Did It Go Barbabravo? / The Big Bad Hen
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E104 - Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: E104 - Moon Parrot
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: E221 - The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrel
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: E119 - Runaway Rocket
programme.desc: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket! Now it's up to Blaze and AJ to rescue the two trucks before their runaway rocket crashes into the garbage dump.

programme.title: E505 - Abra-Ka-Pickle!
programme.desc: Pickle is putting on a magic show for all of Axle City! But when Crusher accidentally makes a magical mistake, it's up to Blaze and Pickle to fix the magic and save their friends! Abra-ka-Pickle!

programme.title: E305 - Dora's Birthday Surprise / Moonlight Fiesta

programme.title: E308 - The Bunny Boyz / Dancing Osito
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help the Bunny Boyz boy band get super clean and sparkly before their big show! // Dora and Boots track down Osito, Isabela's lost teddy bear, and get him back before she wakes up.

programme.title: E9 - Calebs Corvette Part 2
programme.desc: The '56 Corvette is completed, with a couple of twists. The family has decided to change the colour from red to arctic blue with a silver teardrop.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome To The Chaos
programme.desc: Six teams arrive in Tucson, Arizona, for a racing competition with $5K hoopties. Then the teams must build and modify their vehicles for the final drag race.

programme.title: E10 - Crown Hick Is Built And Bought!
programme.desc: Tony Angelo and Lucky Costa are reunited with the Crown Hick, a '66 F-100 sitting on a 2007 Crown Victoria frame, with suspension upgrades and a supercharger.

programme.title: E12 - Growing Pains
programme.desc: Bobby considers growing his operation and making big purchases. But when the swamp brings uncertainty, he has second thoughts.

programme.title: E4 - Roman Roast On The River
programme.desc: Myron Mixon, Robby Royal, Michael Character and Ernest Servantes face off for their final Pit War battle.

programme.desc: Nick appraises a 1948 Bentley possibly linked to a Hollywood legend. Addison takes a hard look at a 'Gone In 60 Seconds' tribute Mustang.

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: Hosted by Tom Chitty, “The Score” is CNBC's smart, fast-moving guide to the forces transforming global sport. Going beyond the drama of the game, the series unpacks the money, power and strategy driving decisions behind the scenes - from boardrooms to locker rooms.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 1
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E3 - Vegetables
programme.desc: Jason shares his love of fresh produce with a trip to a supersized Dubai vegetable market as he makes dishes that include a tomato tartare with black olive tapenade and a pudding made with beetroot and carrot. He is joined by Chef Mohamed Orfali, who visits a farm just outside Dubai that grows vegetables in desert sand.

programme.title: E3 - Spring
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle

programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E9

programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.desc: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her. Release Year: 2023 Director: Ashima Chibber

programme.title: E1 - Old To Bold
programme.desc: Meg and Joe Piercy tackle a huge renovation for a young couple who can't figure out how to move forward with a property that's stuck between two decades.

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E5 - Let's Play Dress Up with Baby John!
programme.desc: It's time to play dress up with Baby John & his family! First, they put on funny costumes & have a disco dance party in the living room! Then, Jill helps the whole family be as stylish as they can be in fun & silly costumes. The dress-up fun continues as Baby John, Jack & Jill pretend to be police officers for the day & superheroes who help keep the playground safe & clean!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E6 - Fun Adventures & Sleepy Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big animal adventure with JJ! The fun starts on Grandpa's farm, where JJ learns all about the animals & the sounds they make. He even helps give a sheep a bath! Then, it's time to head to the ocean. Join JJ & his family as they visit an aquarium & sing 'Baby Shark' with a real shark family! The adventure gets prehistoric when Ms. Appleberry teaches the class all about their favorite dinosaurs. From guessing games to meeting Bingo the dog, it's a wild day!

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.title: E2 - Hugo Servanin/Lou De Pray
programme.desc: We head off to the Fine Arts Museum in Libourne. Deep dive into sculptor Hugo Servanin's library of bodies and engineering laboratory. Danish designer Cecilie Bahnsen: combining Scandinavian pragmatism with French know-how. Discovery: digital light embroidery by Lou de Pray.

programme.title: E16 - Nadia Ounais (Tunisia)
programme.desc: Born in Tunisia, Nadia Ounais has been passionate about diving and oceanography since childhood. After a brilliant career in biology and oceanology, she takes over the direction of the Oceanographic Institute of Monaco. Deeply attached to her native country, she participated in the renovation of the Salammbo aquarium.

programme.title: E2 - Hugo Servanin/Lou De Pray
programme.desc: We head off to the Fine Arts Museum in Libourne. Deep dive into sculptor Hugo Servanin's library of bodies and engineering laboratory. Danish designer Cecilie Bahnsen: combining Scandinavian pragmatism with French know-how. Discovery: digital light embroidery by Lou de Pray.

programme.title: L'invite:2026-1
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: E3 - Kokom
programme.desc: Dounia and her grandparents are gradually getting to know Canada, their new country. But for little Dounia, it isn't easy to get used to its seasons, food and language. She misses her father terribly. Fortunately her new friends rally round to help her make progress.

programme.title: E9 - Make A Child Move While Reading
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: E12 - The Little Recycler
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires:2026
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E3022-055

programme.desc: Shiro finds out that the Bobobobobone is at a jewellery shop with tight security. Will he be able to get past the sensors to get to it?

programme.title: E320 - Bamboo Warfare/Bear In The Clouds/Umbrella Tactics/Neither Yin, Nor Yang/Mechatronics
programme.desc: Grizzy dismantles the toboggan built by the Lemmings in the log cabin and reemploys the bamboo sticks to build a jacuzzi.

programme.title: E8 - B. Franken Kitty/Tom-Foolery/Haunted Mouse/Here's Looking A-Choo Kid!/Superfied
programme.desc: Dr Bigby creates a machine to turn back the hands of time for his beloved cat Wilson. Tom is trying to break into the lab to eat Jerry and Napoleon, and accidentally gets mistaken for a young Wilson and is taken home. Tom must convince Dr. Bigby he's got the wrong cat! Jerry and Napoleon are left with the real Wilson, who is a mean vicious cat.

programme.title: E163 - Skyscraper Scrap/ Balloon Salesman: Feeling Down/ The Devil And The Deep Blue Sea/Cru
programme.desc: Sylvester chases a sky-high snack. Daffy’s business feels the effects of inflation. Taz sets sail on a cargo ship… handle with care!

programme.title: E69 - The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: E2 - A. Driver's Ed/Dog Hand
programme.desc: Robin is inadvertently the getaway driver for a bank robbery, in the midst of his driving test.

programme.title: E75 - Stick It/Bean At The Museum/A Car For Irma/Trophy Bean/Game Over
programme.desc: Bean discovers Mrs. Wicket’s nephew and Bruiser Jnr swapping football stickers and decides that he wants to fill up a sticker album too.

programme.title: E7 - Death Punchies/It's Time/Muscle Mentor/World's Best Boss/Bachelor Party! Zingo!!
programme.desc: Tired of Mordecai always beating him at punchies and getting his way, Rigby decides to learn the martial art of 'Death Kwon Do'.

programme.title: E69 - The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.title: Golmaal Again

programme.title: E163
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E150
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E11 - 墨爾本男嘉賓再赴尋愛之約
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 本劇以患病少女何冉在生命最後階段學習生活、情感經歷與個人成長為線，講述她在遇到有著難以釋懷過往、幾乎對未來人生失去信心的傑出園藝家蕭寒後，兩人經過一系列誤打誤撞的、溫馨浪漫的奇妙際遇後，從彼此身上尋回各自生命中最重要卻曾經缺失的部分，重拾對生活的信心和希望，也收穫刻骨銘心愛情的故事。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 《膽小鬼》電視劇是由檸萌影業、優酷聯合出品，鄭執編劇，張曉波執導，歐豪、王硯輝領銜主演，王玉雯、周依然、侯雯元主演的青春懸疑犯罪短劇集。該劇改編自鄭執的長篇小說《生吞》，該劇講述了一段四個少年的青春往事，多年後一樁重現的罪案，讓所有人不得不面對人性最真實的「黑白戰爭」。

programme.title: E522
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

E4 - Journey Back
programme.desc: The team battle a flash flood, save rusting equipment and deal with a team member's drug problem. A valuable diamond is found - the biggest to date.

programme.title: E6 - Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who’s character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build a jungle.

programme.title: E4 - Journey Back
programme.desc: The team battle a flash flood, save rusting equipment and deal with a team member's drug problem. A valuable diamond is found - the biggest to date.

programme.title: E6 - Terry and The Minigun
programme.desc: Can you really fire a GE Minigun handheld with ammunition held in a backpack (also seen on Captain America: Winter Soldier). Additionally, for one of our larger tests – can you actually chop down a jungle forest with a minigun? Actor Bill Duke – who co-starred with Arnold Schwarzenegger for the film and who’s character performed this weapon stunt – joins us to find out. But first, we have to build a jungle.

Rule #1
programme.desc: Every day, the Police Force receives 185 phone calls.180 of them are about burglaries, murders, rapes and kidnappings. The remaining 5 begin with: “There is something strange in my house, can you please send someone over to take a look?” For rookie Sergeant Lee, being a cop means running down crooks and upholding the law. Injured in a shoot-out, he finds out to his horror that he is reassigned to the dubious-sounding Miscellaneous Affairs Department (MAD)...

programme.title: The Incredible Truth
programme.desc: Jia Jia went to Japan with her fiance to meet her family. As soon as she arrived at the foot of Mount Fuji, she was imprisoned by local villagers and led an inhuman life. The cowardly Hirota only knew how to sorrow through wine. Jia Jia's good sister Wei Ling resolutely went to Japan to find Jia Jia. With the help of agent Kinoshita, the investigation gradually deepened, but the surrounding environment became more and more sinister. Hirota was strangled to death in a hot spring pool. Michiko went mad because of extreme fear. Yuko was still sane but unable to express when she was attacked. Tadao often spied Wei Ling through the cracks in the door. Residents under the shadow of nuclear radiation gradually lost their humanity, like a hyena, and ready to bite Wei Ling this outsider.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Prisoner Of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione return as teenagers for a third term at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry and must face a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Our lives are the sum of our choices. Tom Cruise is Ethan Hunt in Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.
